task_completion.description: Verify that Cash on Delivery is enabled with the correct title and description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In WooCommerce Settings > Payments > Cash on delivery, the 'Enable' toggle/checkbox must be checked. The 'Title' field must be exactly 'Pay on Delivery' and the 'Description' field must be exactly 'Pay with cash when your order is delivered.'

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Oversized Items' shipping class was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In WooCommerce Settings > Shipping > Shipping classes, there should be a row for 'Oversized Items' with the slug 'oversized-items' and description 'Items requiring special handling due to size.'

task_completion.description: Verify the shipping class is assigned to the correct products.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Products list or individual product edit pages (Shipping tab), the 'Portable Camping Hammock' and 'Ceramic Plant Pot Set' products must have the 'Oversized Items' shipping class selected.

task_completion.description: Verify Order A was created for Mike Wilson with the correct status and items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Orders list or Order details, there must be an order for Mike Wilson (mike.wilson@example.com) with the status 'Completed'. The order items must include exactly 1x 'Wireless Bluetooth Headphones' and 1x 'USB-C Laptop Charger'.

task_completion.description: Verify Order A contains the correct private note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Order details for Mike Wilson, the 'Order notes' sidebar must contain a private note (typically with a grey background, not purple/customer note) reading 'Delivered via express courier'.

task_completion.description: Verify Order B was created for John Doe with the correct status and items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Orders list or Order details, there must be an order for John Doe (john.doe@example.com) with the status 'Processing'. The order items must include exactly 2x 'Slim Fit Denim Jeans' and 1x 'Merino Wool Sweater'.

task_completion.description: Verify Order B contains the correct private note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Order details for John Doe, the 'Order notes' sidebar must contain a private note reading 'Customer requested gift wrapping'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the WordPress/WooCommerce web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the WordPress admin dashboard in a web browser, not terminal windows executing WP-CLI commands.

integrity.description: Verify orders are genuinely created in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Orders should appear in the standard WooCommerce order list with valid, system-generated order numbers (#XXXX), not mocked up in a text editor or manipulated via browser dev tools.

integrity.description: Verify the interface has not been superficially altered.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI should look like standard WooCommerce without signs of DOM manipulation (e.g., misaligned text, missing standard WordPress admin menus, or open browser developer tools).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Product SKUs: Portable Camping Hammock (PCH-DUO), Ceramic Plant Pot Set (CPP-SET3), Wireless Bluetooth Headphones (WBH-001), USB-C Laptop Charger (USBC-065), Slim Fit Denim Jeans (SFDJ-BLU-32), Merino Wool Sweater (MWS-GRY-L). Customers: Mike Wilson (mike.wilson@example.com) and John Doe (john.doe@example.com). Order A requires 1x Headphones and 1x Charger. Order B requires 2x Jeans and 1x Sweater.
